_comment: Charon capture-pipeline config. Copy to config.json and edit, OR have scripts/first-run.py render it from your wizard answers.
vaultRoot: <absolute path to your vault root — same as $HARNESS_VAULT_ROOT>

captureWindow._comment: Earliest date to fetch from on a clean run. Cursor advances forward from here.

capture._comment: Sent-items capture is ON by default. Set false to skip the sent path entirely.

provider._comment: One of: m365 | gmail | imap. Each block below configures the named provider. Only the chosen one needs to be valid.
provider.name: m365

m365._comment: Register an app in Entra ID with Mail.Read delegated permission. See EMAIL-PROVIDER-SETUP.md.
m365.tenantId: <your tenant ID, or 'common' for personal accounts>

gmail._comment: Create an OAuth client in Google Cloud Console, enable Gmail API. See EMAIL-PROVIDER-SETUP.md.

imap._comment: Generic IMAP. Use an app password (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo all support these). NEVER your main password.
imap._folder_note: Common sent-folder names: 'Sent', 'Sent Items' (Outlook), '[Gmail]/Sent Mail', 'Sent Messages'. Check your IMAP client.

vaultPaths._comment: Where captures land. Subfolders auto-created. _domain/_uncertain are inbox-side routing fallbacks; sent items follow the same shape.

senderBlocklist: _comment: regex strings — match against sender for inbox, recipient for sent. Skips noise like calendar bots, newsletters, build alerts.

sensitivity._comment: Frontmatter classification default + escalation keywords. Pure heuristic — for fine-grained control, edit lib/format.mjs.

domainKeywordMap._comment: First-match-wins routing for emails that don't match an org-unit. Replace with your own topic buckets.

orgUnitDomainMap._comment: Email-domain → org-unit routing. Populated by first-run from your reference_org_units.md or hand-edited. Example pattern.
